sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current segmentation boundaries
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for node in seg['nodes']:

        print(f"Node {node['id']}: color={node['color']}, pixels={node['pixels']}, boundary={node['boundary'][:4]}")

# Try clicking on right black bar (Node 11, cols 30-43, rows 40-43)
result = action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 41, 'col': 35}])
print(f"After clicking right black bar: level_completed={last_action_result.get('level_completed')}, done={last_action_result.get('done')}")

if not last_action_result.get('level_completed') and not last_action_result.get('done'):
    # Try clicking on the boundary between Node 9 and Node 10 (col 27-28)
    result = action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 41, 'col': 27}])
    print(f"After clicking boundary left: level_completed={last_action_result.get('level_completed')}, done={last_action_result.get('done')}")

if not last_action_result.get('level_completed') and not last_action_result.get('done'):
    # Try clicking on the boundary between Node 10 and Node 11 (col 29-30)
    result = action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 41, 'col': 30}])
    print(f"After clicking boundary right: level_completed={last_action_result.get('level_completed')}, done={last_action_result.get('done')}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
